title: Sight Words: word bank data structure with confusable pairs (pig/pug, cat/car) and categories
Sight Words: add more expressive sound effects (cha-ching, wah-wah style)
Sight Words: settings screen (target points, number of choices, word categories)
Animal Sort: add more categories (food, objects, etc.) with different sizes - animals default
description: Support multiple emoji categories beyond animals. Each category can have different number of items. Animals remains the default selection.

title: Sight Words: add difficulty levels - same-start words (cat/cap, pig/pin) as harder mode
Animal Sort: font options - cursive/print and big/small letters
description: Add settings to toggle between cursive script and print letters for the bucket labels, and between uppercase/lowercase.

title: Sight Words: pre-generate images using nano-banana-pro (bold outlines, bright colors, white bg)
Animal Sort: show sorted emoji inside buckets
description: When an animal/item is correctly sorted into a bucket, show a smaller version of the emoji inside/below the bucket letter.

title: Sight Words: scoring system (+1 correct, -1 wrong), target point goal with celebration animation
Sight Words: let user specify custom reward text in settings (e.g. 'watch a show', 'get a treat')
Animal Sort: hide text labels until 2 wrong attempts
description: Don't show the word below the emoji by default. Only reveal the text label after the player puts it in the wrong bucket twice (as a hint).

title: Sight Words: core React component with multiple choice UI (2-4 options), show word/image, select matching text/image
